signals.headline: China's Q1 2026 GDP grows 5% year-on-year, beating expectations of 4
signals.raw:
China's Q1 2026 GDP grows 5% year-on-year, beating expectations of 4.8% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
China's National Bureau of Statistics released official data on April 16, 2026, showing Q1 GDP growth at 5.0%, up from 4.5% in Q4 2025 and exceeding Bloomberg estimates; this aligns with Beijing's full-year target of 4.5-5% amid Middle East conflict risks.[1]

signals.headline: Ripple Unveils Quantum-Resistant Roadmap for XRPL by 2028 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple Unveils Quantum-Resistant Roadmap for XRPL by 2028 | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ripple published a detailed four-phase roadmap on April 20, 2026, to make the XRP Ledger quantum-ready by 2028, positioning it ahead of Bitcoin and Ethereum on this technological timeline[1][5]. Phase 3, beginning in the second half of 2026, will involve deploying and testing hybrid signature schemes on Devnet[1].

signals.headline: XRP Outperforms Major Cryptos with 6
signals.raw:
XRP Outperforms Major Cryptos with 6.7% Weekly Gains | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP gained 6.7% over seven days through April 20, 2026, driven by its listing on Japan's Rakuten Wallet, integration of zero-knowledge technology on XRPL, and four consecutive days of US ETF inflows totaling $38.86 million[1]. European institutions also contributed significant capital[1].

signals.headline: SEC Regulatory Clarity Roundtable Scheduled | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Regulatory Clarity Roundtable Scheduled | YES | MED confidence**

The SEC scheduled a roundtable for April 16, 2026, to discuss the CLARITY Act, which aims to determine regulatory oversight of digital assets between the SEC and CFTC[1]. This reduces long-term institutional adoption uncertainty for XRP[1].

signals.headline: XRP Price Action at Technical Inflection Point | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Price Action at Technical Inflection Point | YES | MED confidence**

XRP is testing a symmetrical triangle pattern with a bearish MACD signal, creating tension between short-term chart pressure and longer-term institutional demand fundamentals[1]. The token is near $1.43 resistance levels[1][4].
